citation.description: test_graph_build_scales_linearly and test_hierarchy_enforcement_benchmark_relative are absent; test_run_acli_429_retries_with_rate_limit_backoff patches _backoff_sleep (not time.sleep) at test_acli_subprocess_timeout.py:378; test_worker_hard_crash_maps_to_parse_error_not_host_crash uses real process with poll-based discriminator

criteria.criterion: The three tests are deterministic — assert invariants/behavior, not wall-clock or global sleep counts — and cannot fail from runner contention.

citation.description: test_signal_death_not_misclassified_as_timeout_under_reap_lag deterministically injects is_alive reap lag via _ReapLagCtx, asserts abstain_reason=='parse_error'; harness.py line 346 gates on 'not polled' not 'is_alive()'

criteria.criterion: harness.run_in_worker classifies a signal-killed worker as parse_error regardless of reap timing; a RED test reproduces the misclassification deterministically (inject the is_alive race) and passes after the fix; mutation (revert) returns it to RED.

citation.description: Wall-clock tests absent; test_build_dep_graph_single_batch_scan (asserts exactly 1 reduce_all_tickets call), test_find_direct_blockers_no_per_ticket_scan (0 _reduce_ticket calls), test_compute_dep_graph_children_use_preloaded_state (0 _reduce_ticket calls) remain present

criteria.criterion: The O(n) build invariant remains covered by the deterministic call-count tests after the wall-clock tests are removed/demoted; genuine perf/benchmark checks do not gate the merge.

citation.description: test_run_acli_429_retries_with_rate_limit_backoff patches acli_subprocess._backoff_sleep (not module-global time.sleep), asserts delays == [1.0]; _backoff_sleep seam defined in acli_subprocess.py:214

criteria.criterion: The acli 429 test asserts exactly the Retry-After backoff behavior, robust to unrelated process-reap sleeps.

citation.description: Ticket comment (actor: joeoakhart@navapbc.com, date 2026-07-20) attests commit 2b13e6ae6 is merged on origin/main; landing on main requires Verified +1 (GitHub Actions ran make lint && make typecheck && make test green at that SHA).
